regions.text: We say the earth is getting smaller because we can travel about it more easily. Many people travel outside their own countries.
We get news from any part of the world in seconds. Interest in other nations is good if it goes deep enough. We need to know more.
Wider knowledge will help the world to better days. understand something: have a clear, true idea of it.
travel: make a journey. FUTURE: will travel. PRESENT: travel(s). PAST: traveled.
